name: soroe
description: A design compiler: from visual references to a design system, then to an implementation contract an AI agent can build and verify.

scripts.check: node --check ./bin/soroe.js && node --check ./src/*.js && node ./bin/soroe.js validate ./fixtures/valid/minimal.recipe.json && node ./bin/soroe.js compile ./examples/observatory.recipe.json --out ./build/observatory --check
